text.title: Data-Driven Requirements Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (input fields, scores, thresholds) to a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: Halt; do not author the artefact.
Halt; do not author the artefact.
Run data-driven requirements derivation with evidence trail per requirement.

example.trace: data_exists=true → snr=ok → run derivation; produced 4 requirements with high-confidence evidence.
